meaning: n.阿朗索(Alphonso的异体 亦作Alonzo)(m.)
examples: Fernando Alonso: "I am pleased with this result."
Q: The race in Melbourne proved why you wanted Alonso back…
Although no one was injured, Alonso was forced to postpone his travel plans.
If Hamilton wins, Alonso would then only need a top-five finish to guarantee the title.
Vettel needs to win with Alonso out of the top four to be champion.
